prompt: A morning talk show news desk set with two men at podiums. On the left, a bald mustached man in a light suit looking irritated and holding a cue card. On the right, a tall man with glasses in a dark jacket with finger beside chin, smiling slyly. Background shows a news desk with coffee mug, studio monitors, warm morning light streaming in through windows. The set has a daytime talk show feel — bright, warm, inviting. Ink sketch on aged parchment paper, hand-drawn illustration style with visible line work and paper texture. No text, no words, no letters anywhere in the image.
negative_prompt: text, words, letters, numbers, captions, subtitles, watermarks, signatures, blurry, deformed hands, photorealistic, 3D render, CGI, digital art look, clean vector style
style: Hand-drawn ink sketch on aged parchment paper, editorial illustration style, visible pen strokes, cross-hatching for shadows, warm paper tone background, similar to courtroom sketch or storyboard art
composition: 16:9 wide shot, two men at podiums flanking center, morning show set visible in background, medium line weight
lighting: warm morning studio lighting, soft and inviting, slightly warm tone from paper
color_palette: primarily black ink on warm cream/beige parchment, minimal color — only subtle warm tones from the paper itself
